title: Aggressor (Executor-class)

The '''''Aggressor''''' was an [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] in the service of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Roek]], the ''Aggressor'' and a force of five [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] were part of the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] that patrolled the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]. Six [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the ''Aggressor'' and its escorts were recalled to the Imperial [[CEC shipyards|shipyards]] at [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], where they defended the Imperial withdrawal from the [[Corellian system/Legends|system]] as the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]—formerly the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]—began conquering [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].

By [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], the ''Aggressor'' was in the hands of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Josef Grunger]], one of the first Imperial [[Warlord/Legends|warlords]] and a man loyal only to himself. Grunger bullied [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officers]] into turning over their [[Starship/Legends|ships]] to his command, gathering a sizable armada of [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] and smaller [[Cruiser/Legends|cruisers]]. The Grand Admiral led this [[Flotilla/Legends|flotilla]] from the ''Aggressor'' and plotted to use his fleet to seize the Imperial [[Capital/Legends|capital]] world of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], utilizing the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] as a launch point. However, the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] had already been taken by fellow Grand Admiral [[Danetta Pitta]]; when Grunger's forces arrived in the Corellian [[Star system/Legends|system]], Pitta took command of a [[Grand Admiral Pitta's torpedo sphere|Torpedo Sphere]] siege platform and began [[Battle of Tralus (Galactic Civil War)|decimating]] his rival's fleet. Grunger, faced with the likelihood of defeat, [[Ramming/Legends|rammed]] his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] into the Torpedo Sphere, an act that [[Death/Legends|killed]] both Grand Admirals and destroyed both vessels.

==Description==
The ''Aggressor'' was the third [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] manufactured for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and the second warship of that class built at [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]].<ref name="EGW" /> The ''Aggressor'' was one of many such [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] serving the fragmenting Empire in the [[Time/Legends|years]] following the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. The [[Warship/Legends|warship]] served as a [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] and [[Command ship/Legends|command vessel]].<ref name="R&R" />

==History==
[[File:GAGrunger-SWI66.png|thumb|left|180px|Grand Admiral Grunger, final commander of the ''Aggressor'']]
The third ''Executor''-class warship to be manufactured,<ref name="EGW" /> the ''Aggressor'' was the flagship of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Roek]], a cunning Imperial [[Commander/Legends|commander]]. Assigned an escort of five [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]], the ''Aggressor'' patrolled the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]. Approximately six [[Standard month/Legends|months]] following the Battle of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], the ''Aggressor'' and its escorts were recalled to guard the Imperial-held [[CEC shipyards|shipyards]] at [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. Information on this reassignment, sent from the Imperial [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], was intercepted by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and utilized in preparations for an eventual New Republic assault on the capital [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="R&R" /> The ''Aggressor'' defended the Imperial withdrawal from the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] as the New Republic began its conquest of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="CSWE" />

[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Josef Grunger]], having become one of many [[Warlord/Legends|warlords]] in the power vacuum resulting from Palpatine's death, had his own plans for the ''Aggressor''. Using his high [[Military rank/Legends|rank]], he bullied [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officers]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] into surrendering their [[Starship/Legends|vessels]] to his [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]]. Grunger amassed an armada of thirty ''Imperial''-class and [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]], one hundred [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruisers]], and sixty [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruisers]], among other ships. To lead this [[Flotilla/Legends|flotilla]], Grunger secured the ''Aggressor'' and made it his own command ship.<ref name="Who's Who" />

Following the same goal as the New Republic,<ref name="R&R" /> the ambitious Grunger planned to attack Coruscant with his fleet<ref name="Who's Who" /> in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]],<ref name="EGW" /> using the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] as a launching point. However, the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] had already been claimed by Grand Admiral [[Danetta Pitta]] after bribing the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Diktat]]. Upon Grunger's arrival in the Corellian [[Star system/Legends|system]], near the planet [[Tralus/Legends|Tralus]], Pitta took control of a [[Grand Admiral Pitta's torpedo sphere|Torpedo Sphere]] siege platform and began to [[Battle of Tralus (Galactic Civil War)|annihilate]] Grunger's armada. Refusing to let Pitta win, Grunger [[Ramming/Legends|rammed]] the ''Aggressor'' into Pitta's Torpedo Sphere, an act that destroyed both vessels. Both Grand Admirals, still aboard their flagships, perished in the collision.<ref name="Who's Who" />

==Commanders and crew==
The [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] was originally commanded by Roek, a cunning admiral who used the ''Aggressor'' as his flagship.<ref name="R&R" /> The warship was later commandeered by Grand Admiral Josef Grunger, one of the earliest breakaway Imperial warlords following the Battle of Endor. Ambitious and loyal to no one but himself, Grunger took the ''Aggressor'' as his own command ship, leading a sizable force of [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] and other vessels from it. The Grand Admiral sought to conquer Imperial Center with his armada, using the Corellian system as a staging point. It was in that system, at the Battle of Tralus, where a losing Grunger took the Super Star Destroyer and rammed it into fellow Grand Admiral Pitta's Torpedo Sphere, destroying both combatant commanders and their flagships.<ref name="Who's Who" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Aggressor'' was first mentioned in the article "[[Recon & Report: The Journey to Coruscant]]," published in the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 2|second issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' in [[1994]].<ref name="R&R" />
